rules.rule: core/ is Layer 1 — it may only import from kernel/ and utils/. Never import from topology/, operations/, 2d/, query/, measurement/, io/, worker/, sketching/, text/, or projection/.
Use createHandle() or createKernelHandle() from src/core/disposal.ts for resource management. Handles must support the 'using' keyword for automatic disposal.
DisposalScope disposes in LIFO order. Register dependencies AFTER their dependees to ensure correct teardown ordering.
exactOptionalPropertyTypes is enabled. undefined and missing are distinct. Use 'prop?: T | undefined' for optional fields that can be explicitly set to undefined.
